detail: Item 19 reports historic Gross Revenue of qualified franchisees operating under the same fee structure as current new franchisees. The royalty rate (7% CFF), advertising fund rate (1.2%), RMM fees, and technology fees described in Item 6 apply uniformly to all franchisees. Item 19 Note 10 confirms: 'Each of the Qualified Franchisees offers primarily the same products and services that we expect new TeamLogic IT Business franchisees to offer, and each receives primarily the same services from us that we expect new franchisees to receive.' No pro-forma, illustrative, or comparable cohort with different economics is used.
scorecard_note: Item 19 cohort comparability: no discrepancy found. Cohort and current new franchisees operate under same fee structure.
